name: email-mcp
description: Read, send, and manage email from Claude Desktop via IMAP/SMTP. Wraps ai-zerolab/mcp-email-server.
long_description: Gives Claude the ability to interact with your email account. Supports reading emails with filtering (by sender, recipient, subject, date), sending emails with threading support, managing multiple accounts, and downloading attachments. Works with Gmail, Outlook, ProtonMail Bridge, and any standard IMAP/SMTP provider.

password.title: Password / App Password
password.description: Your email password or app-specific password. For Gmail, generate an App Password at https://myaccount.google.com/apppasswords

imap_host.title: IMAP Host
imap_host.description: IMAP server hostname (e.g. imap.gmail.com, outlook.office365.com, 127.0.0.1 for ProtonMail Bridge)

smtp_host.title: SMTP Host
smtp_host.description: SMTP server hostname (e.g. smtp.gmail.com, smtp.office365.com, 127.0.0.1 for ProtonMail Bridge)

user_name.title: Login Username
user_name.description: Login username if different from your email address. Leave blank to use your email address.

full_name.title: Display Name
full_name.description: Your name as it appears in sent emails (e.g. Jane Doe). Leave blank to use the local part of your email.

account_name.title: Account Name
account_name.description: A label for this account (e.g. work, personal). Defaults to 'default'.

tools.name: add_email_account
tools.description: Add or update an email account configuration with IMAP/SMTP server settings

tools.name: get_emails
tools.description: Retrieve emails with filtering by sender, recipient, subject, body, and date range with pagination

tools.name: get_emails_content
tools.description: Fetch full email content for specific email IDs

tools.name: send_email
tools.description: Send an email with support for multiple recipients, CC, BCC, subject, body, and reply threading

tools.name: download_attachment
tools.description: Download an email attachment to a specified path (requires attachment downloads to be enabled)
